title: FLASHBACK — phone number on coffee receipt
prompt: @young_Mama at the cafe table, right hand HOLDS a small pencil, fingers slowly WRITE a phone number on a paper coffee receipt on the marble table. Hand GENTLY SLIDES the receipt across. young_Mama (soft kind): "If you ever come back..." @young_Papa right hand TAKES the receipt carefully, looks down at the number, mouth SMILES wide. young_Papa: "I will. I promise."
